title: An Endangered Tasmanian Devil Escaped a Wildlife Park. Nobody Can Find Her.
script: A 2-year-old Tasmanian devil named Mary escaped from a wildlife park in Queensland, Australia — and has been on the run for 4 days. She's endangered, nocturnal, and can roam 10 miles in a single night. Twelve wildlife experts, thermal imaging drones, and a sniffer dog have searched around the clock. CCTV shows Mary sprinting into the dark just hours before anyone noticed. Tasmanian devils have been extinct on the Australian mainland for 3,000 years. Nobody's found her yet.
